_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: C max was reached by 4 hours and measured 2.9μM; blood plasma levels reached 2.77 by 2 hours
details: Pharmacokinetic analysis showed Cmax reached by 4 hours and measured 2.9μM; blood plasma levels reached 2.77 by 2 hours at 20 mg/kg b.i.d. for 5 days.
